name: Busy Day Cocoa Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together the softened butter and boiling water until the butter is completely melted.
2. Add the HERSHEY'S Cocoa and vanilla extract; beat until well blended.
3. Gradually add the powdered sugar, beating until smooth, creamy and of spreading consistency. If necessary, add additional boiling water to achieve desired consistency. About 2 cups of icing will be produced.
(Note: Hershey's is a registered trademark of Hershey Foods Corporation.)
